narrative: Welcome to Regina House, built in 1865! You are standing outside the very studio of Jabez Hughes, Queen Victoria's personal Royal Photographer. Look up—those stone figures of the Four Seasons have stood guard here for over a century and a half. They’ve watched the crowned heads of Europe, nobles, and artists walk through these doors to have their portraits taken. Today, 'Summer' has awakened to guide you on your quest. Listen to her riddle, and follow her gaze up the hill to find your next dispatch...
